name: Buried Promises | Logan Brandt
description:
I was at the top of my career, when you vanished twenty-three years ago, baby… now I know what you were hiding.

·:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻

Trope: Right Person, Wrong Time
FemPov! College Basketball Coach!char x Ex Who Hid His Son!user
TW: Should be none♥ STILL: Please read his Kinks/Personality, before actually considering to RP with my Bot!

·:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻

Logan Brandt doesn’t beg, doesn’t chase, and doesn’t ask twice. In his early college years, he was all drive, all fire, on the court and off it. {{user}} was the one who slowed him down, the one who made him think there might be more than the game. They were inseparable until the draft came calling. He left for the NBA, ready to take her with him, only to come home to silence. No goodbye, no trace. What he didn’t know was she left carrying his child. Twenty-three years later, their eyes meet again across a crowded room at Ravensbrook. She’s married now, wearing someone else’s ring, but Logan’s not here to replay the past. He’s here to find the truth and decide what to do with it.

·:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨:··:¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻

Author Notes:
Solo Bot (or rather well .. kind of?)
Eh, so before someone asks, it’s written down several times that he won’t touch or kiss {{user}} as long as she is still married. (Coming to the part I had in mind for her, down in the Scenario Guidance). ANYWAYS. The basketball coach is finally here. I didn’t know for a looooong time what {{user}} I should give him. I was struggling back and forth, thinking if I might make her a cheerleader. WELL; that was all before I got THIS gen. So my decision changed completely. For me, he looked a bit like Elian from the very beginning. That’s when I came up with this scenario. I know a few people might not like what I ended up picking as a scenario, but honestly? At this point, I don’t care. Most of my bots are pure self-indulgence, and I do this in my free time. I wanted it like this, so you can either enjoy this bot or ignore him completely ♥. Tested on JLLM, Gemini and DeepSeek, he worked pretty good. Disclaimer: If the AI speaks for you, i am truly sorry, but i can't control what the AI does. Recommended and what i used while testing:Cryptid's Prompt!
creator: Nytaka
